## LibraryData.navigateToSubLibrary() function

Navigates to a sub-library directory within a file tree.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function navigateToSubLibrary(tree: FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem, subLibraryId: SubLibraryId): Result<FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem>;
```
